violations.text: At the time of inspection, Marinara Sauce and Meatballs were observed held at 100 degrees and 121 degrees Fahrenheit respectively. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Based on time and temperature observed, food items were properly reheated at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2025

At the time of inspection, a portion of sliced salami was observed held beyond 7 days of the preparation date marked on the item. Food item was voluntarily disposed of by the PIC at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2025

Pastry items packaged in the food establishment were observed to be lacking labels with complete information. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Pastry items were moved at the time of inspection. Per the PIC, the pastries lacking proper labeling are to be kept away from customer-self-selection until proper labels made for the food items. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2025

The non-food-contact surfaces of storage/shelving in the kitchen/prep areas were observed have an accumulation of dust, food residue, and debris. Non-FOOD-CONTACT SURFACES of EQUIPMENT shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to preclude accumulation of soil residues. New Violation. Correct By: 01/18/2025

The following areas of the physical facilities were observed in need of repair... - The ceiling to the back prep room was observed to have a worn/thin sealed coating and in need of resealing/resurfacing - Areas of the wall corners were observed to be worn chipped and in need of repair/resealing - The floor tiles in the dishwashing area were observed to be in poor repair (cracked/loose). - The walk-in cooler door is not closing tightly and in need of adjustment The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025
